---
author: "Simon Allzén"
title: "Workspace Map"
subtitle: "_Historical Continuity as Justification for Dark Matter_"

format:
  html:
    theme:
      dark: darkly
      light: flatly
    mainfont: "Fraunces"
    fontsize: "10pt"
    code-fold: true
    code-summary: "Show the code"
    tabset: true
    minimal: true
    max-width: "1600"
    smooth-scroll: true
    page-layout: article
    df-print: kable
    mermaid:
      theme: neutral
execute:
  enabled: false
---

## Workspace Map

This document maps the local workspace surface for the historical
continuity paper.

## At a glance

- `config/` defines the paper-local path contract.
- `code/` is the canonical execution surface.
- shared project inputs are read directly from `../../shared-assets/data/processed-data/` through `config/paths.yml`.
- `data/derived/` stores the paper-local rebuildable output surface.
- `code/notebooks/` provides transparent stagewise derivations.
- `code/scripts/` contains the plain-language R build route.
- `outputs/manuscript/` contains the manuscript-facing generated
  artifacts.
- `paper/assets/` is the authoritative manuscript asset surface, and
  `overleaf/` mirrors it.

## Repository Structure

```{text}
workspace/
├── README.md
├── LICENSE
├── Makefile
├── code/
│   ├── notebooks/
│   └── scripts/
├── config/
│   ├── paths.yml
│   ├── requirements.txt
│   ├── renv.lock
│   ├── DESCRIPTION
│   └── workspace.json
├── data/
│   └── derived/
│       └── avg_citations_result.parquet
├── outputs/
│   └── manuscript/
│       ├── figures/
│       └── tables/
└── docs/
    └── repo-map.qmd
```

## Structure Chart

```{mermaid}
flowchart LR
    A["workspace/"]
    A --> X["code/"]
    A --> C["config/"]
    A --> DD["data/derived/"]
    A --> SA["../../shared-assets/data/processed-data/"]
    X --> NB["notebooks/"]
    X --> RS["scripts/"]
    A --> O["outputs/"]

    NB --> NB1["1.0.0 prepare avg citations"]
    NB --> NB2["2.0.0 build impact figure"]
    RS --> R1["3.0.0-build_manuscript_assets.R"]
```

## Canonical Process Flow

```{mermaid}
flowchart LR
    SD["shared-assets/data/processed-data"] --> N1["1.0.0-prepare_avg_citations.ipynb"]
    N1 --> D1["data/derived/avg_citations_result.parquet"]
    D1 --> N2["2.0.0-build_impact_figure.ipynb"]
    SD --> N2
    SD --> R1["3.0.0-build_manuscript_assets.R"]
    N2 --> O1["outputs/manuscript/figures/fig-impact.pdf"]
    R1 --> O2["outputs/manuscript/figures + tables"]
    O1 --> P["../paper/assets/"]
    O2 --> P
    P --> OVL["../overleaf/"]
```

## Interpretation Guide

- The stable shared input source is `../../shared-assets/data/processed-data/`, referenced through `config/paths.yml`.
- The stable local derived interface is `data/derived/`.
- `outputs/manuscript/` is the visible generated-output root.
- `paper/assets/` is the manuscript-facing sync target, not the place
  where workspace computation happens.
- `overleaf/` mirrors `paper/assets/` rather than reading directly from
  workspace outputs.
